response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with ~15 years of production experience, current Staff-level title, and recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic-workflow tooling, but the role requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions and his AI/GenAI experience only dates to 2025. There is no demonstrated vector database, RAG, or evaluation-pipeline experience, and Python is absent from his skill set. Teaching, workshops, and consulting background partially offset the gap in customer-facing technical discovery leadership.
strengths: Current hands-on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work, directly relevant to agentic workflows
Deep production engineering background across TypeScript/Node.js, AWS CDK, and high-throughput distributed systems
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing record (workshops, courses, conference talks)
concerns: Falls well short of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI-adjacent work)
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or observability pipelines
Python not listed among skills despite being a key technology for the role

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python expertise
